default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Stewart Mohammadi and Marcel Santilli to discuss potential collaboration with GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/8kZHhFJzPwoHZW9qCP-YL4pMuD_ss_Hf?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel's company GrowthX has raised $12M, grown to 35+ clients and \~$6M ARR in less than a year](https://fathom.video/share/8kZHhFJzPwoHZW9qCP-YL4pMuD_ss_Hf?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)
  - [GrowthX combines AI workflows-as-code with expert teams to deliver content marketing services](https://fathom.video/share/8kZHhFJzPwoHZW9qCP-YL4pMuD_ss_Hf?tab=summary&timestamp=696.0)
  - [Stewart has extensive SEO/growth experience at major companies; seeking an innovative role](https://fathom.video/share/8kZHhFJzPwoHZW9qCP-YL4pMuD_ss_Hf?tab=summary&timestamp=1340.0)
  - [Both aligned on importance of "fun" work environment and building something transformative](https://fathom.video/share/8kZHhFJzPwoHZW9qCP-YL4pMuD_ss_Hf?tab=summary&timestamp=1365.0)
  - [Potential next steps: deeper role discussion, possible fast-tracked offer for Stewart](https://fathom.video/share/8kZHhFJzPwoHZW9qCP-YL4pMuD_ss_Hf?tab=summary&timestamp=1542.0)

## Topics

### Background and Career Journeys

  - [Stewart: Started in SEO in 2010, worked at Walmart.com, Nordstrom, other major brands](https://fathom.video/share/8kZHhFJzPwoHZW9qCP-YL4pMuD_ss_Hf?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
  - [Marcel: Built content sites at IBM/HP, led marketing at HashiCorp, DeepGram before founding GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/8kZHhFJzPwoHZW9qCP-YL4pMuD_ss_Hf?tab=summary&timestamp=427.0)
  - [Both have roots in Texas (Stewart from Dallas, Marcel from Houston) but now in Bay Area](https://fathom.video/share/8kZHhFJzPwoHZW9qCP-YL4pMuD_ss_Hf?tab=summary&timestamp=78.0)

### GrowthX Overview

  - [Founded April 2023, now at 35+ clients, \~$6M ARR](https://fathom.video/share/8kZHhFJzPwoHZW9qCP-YL4pMuD_ss_Hf?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)
  - [Just raised $12M Series A](https://fathom.video/share/8kZHhFJzPwoHZW9qCP-YL4pMuD_ss_Hf?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)
  - [Combines AI workflows-as-code with expert teams to deliver content marketing services](https://fathom.video/share/8kZHhFJzPwoHZW9qCP-YL4pMuD_ss_Hf?tab=summary&timestamp=696.0)
  - [64 deals in pipeline, assembling teams rapidly](https://fathom.video/share/8kZHhFJzPwoHZW9qCP-YL4pMuD_ss_Hf?tab=summary&timestamp=629.0)
